title: Cave Story Soundtrack: Opening Theme
description:
The opening theme for Cave Story. This plays during the main menu.

Cave Story, or Doukutsu Monogatari, is a Japanese freeware PC side-scrolling platformer game developed by StudioPixel. If you haven't heard of it, you should look into it, because it's the best freeware game out there.

To learn more, visit http://miraigamer.net/cavestory/downloads_3.php . Please comment if you downloaded it, because I'd really like to see this game grow.

© StudioPixel 2004-2008.
